## Problem

What problem would this solve?

## Proposed Solution

What would you like to happen?

## Alternatives

Have you considered other approaches?

## Scope

- [ ] Small improvement
- [ ] UI improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Backend behavior
- [ ] Room runtime
- [ ] MCP provider
- [ ] Large architectural change

## Notes

Large architectural changes may not be accepted without prior discussion.
